name: expert-design-n-brand
description: Guides teams through structured brand identity discovery, multi-stakeholder synthesis, and design system generation. Produces a complete, tier-classified set of brand artifacts — canonical guidelines, tokens (W3C DTCG with industry-standard vocabulary), Tailwind config, Figma Tokens Studio import, a single consolidated cross-surface design map covering Slides/PowerPoint/Keynote/Canva, process record, and LLM-readable brand definition — from conversational elicitation.
